texto: We were Negroes and our concern was the white man and how to get along with him
autor: how to hold our own and raise ourselves in his esteem without for one moment letting him think he had any God-given rights that we did not also have.
explicacao: Citação de how to hold our own and raise ourselves in his esteem without for one moment letting him think he had any God-given rights that we did not also have. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “We were Negroes and our concern was the white man and how to get along with him” articula reflexao, john-howard-griffin, black-like-me em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como black-like-me.
